articles.title_en: Photos and videos show the aftermath of Ukrainian drone strikes that killed eight night-shift workers at online retailer Wildberries’ warehouses in Russia
articles.lead_en: In the early hours of July 18, Ukrainian drones struck two Wildberries logistics centers in the Moscow and Tambov regions. At a warehouse in the city of Kotovsk, seven night-shift workers were killed and 25 were injured.
articles.title_raw: Photos and videos show the aftermath of Ukrainian drone strikes that killed eight night-shift workers at online retailer Wildberries’ warehouses in Russia
articles.lead_raw: In the early hours of July 18, Ukrainian drones struck two Wildberries logistics centers in the Moscow and Tambov regions. At a warehouse in the city of Kotovsk, seven night-shift workers were killed and 25 were injured.

articles.title_en: 50B rubles in damage, up to 15% of its warehouse space, and a contract clause that shifts the loss onto small vendors: inside Ukraine’s strike on Russia’s online retail giant, Wildberries
articles.lead_en: Eight people have been killed and more than 50 injured in Ukraine’s strike on Wildberries warehouses in the Moscow region and the Tambov region. Volodymyr Zelensky said the strikes hit warehouses holding components used to make drones.

articles.title_en: The Russian Foreign Ministry noted the role of the USSR in eliminating the consequences of the earthquake in Peru in 1970
articles.lead_en: The annual ceremony of laying flowers at the cenotaph was held at the Novodevichy Cemetery in memory of the 22 Soviet pilots, medical workers and rescuers who died in the 1970 crash of a plane over the North Atlantic, which was heading to Peru to provide humanitarian aid after a
articles.title_raw: В МИД РФ отметили роль СССР в ликвидации последствий землетрясения в Перу в 1970 году

articles.title_en: IN BRIEF: Seven killed, over 50 injured in Ukrainian drone attacks on Russian regions
articles.lead_en: At least 370 drones were detected flying toward the Moscow region between the evening of July 17 and the morning of July 18
articles.title_raw: IN BRIEF: Seven killed, over 50 injured in Ukrainian drone attacks on Russian regions
articles.lead_raw: At least 370 drones were detected flying toward the Moscow region between the evening of July 17 and the morning of July 18

articles.title_en: Twenty-five people injured in Ukrainian attack on warehouse in Russia’s Tambov Region
articles.lead_en: The governor Yevgeny Pervyshov said earlier that the attack had killed seven night shift workers
articles.title_raw: Twenty-five people injured in Ukrainian attack on warehouse in Russia’s Tambov Region

articles.title_en: Ukrainians protest and Z-bloggers celebrate after Zelensky fires the defense minister who cut Russia off from Starlink and flooded the front with drones
articles.lead_en: On the evening of July 15, news broke that Ukrainian Defense Minister Mykhailo Fedorov would be dismissed from the post he had held since January. Ukraine’s parliament, the Verkhovna Rada, has yet to formally approve his removal.
